title: eriocaulon nepalense var. nepalense
intro: Eriocaulon nepalense var. nepalense, also known as Himalayan pipewort, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Eriocaulaceae family and is native to the Himalayan region. The plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eriocaulon nepalense var. nepalense include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an expectorant to help relieve coughs and congestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
